This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Nunnezharia warscewiczii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Nunnezharia warscewiczii is commonly prepared as a tea or infused in oil to make a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
